3332080.name: GastroNomicon
3332080.description: GastroNomicon is a chaotic rogue lite third-person shooter where you battle through waves of deranged vegetables in procedurally generated maps and arenas. Collect seeds, upgrade an arsenal of bizarre weapons, and discover random powerups that alter each run. Collect cards that change the arena goals and the battle gameplay. Between battles, build and expand a sinister food-processing factory using light tower defense and automation mechanics. Unlock cursed pages that grant powerful modifiers and reshape your strategy as you assemble the ultimate book of dead factory food. Every run feeds into your progress—every kill makes your factory grow. Check out daily GastroNomicon shorts on YouTube @GastroNomiconGame
3332080.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
